reviews.comment:
Un poco lenta la atención. Son muy estrictos con los baños, si o si hay que consumir para ingresar a los mismos.

Service is a bit slow. They're very strict about the bathrooms; you have to consume something to enter.

reviews.comment:
Siempre cargo ahi cuando voy a La Falda, la última vez, el 29/12/21 quise abonar con la app, escanee el código y el playero me dijo que no funcionaba, le aboné en efectivo los $2000 y ahora me aparece el descuento en la tarjeta....me estafó

(Translated by Google)
I always fill up there when I go to La Falda. The last time, on December 29, 2021, I tried to pay with the app, scanned the code, and the attendant told me it wasn't working. I paid him the $2000 in cash, and now the discount is showing up on my card... I was scammed.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10695122331646821595/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtc2VmendnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención y la rapidez es relativo a cantidad de clientes haya. Amables y eficientes

(Translated by Google)
Good service, and the speed depends on the number of customers. Friendly and efficient.

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
